programme.title: Mickey Virus
programme.desc: Two police officers approach a street smart hacker, Mickey Arora, to help them solve a case. Mickey, along with his friends sets out to crack the case and unravels a complex web of deceit, conspiracy, and danger.

programme.title: C_Kkompany_FUM_Stereo_HIN_HD
programme.desc: A comedy film about three friends who start a fictitious company called C Kkompany to extort money from the corrupt people in their neighborhood. However, their plan backfires when the news of their company spreads like wildfire, and they become the talk of the town. The movie showcases the hilarious consequences of their actions and how they try to redeem themselves in front of the public.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four young loafers wish to simplify their life by wooing a loaded heiress. Unfortunately, there's only one rich girl in the neighbourhood. The boys scamper to woo her first, not knowing that their efforts would lead them right into a murder mystery.

programme.title: Hum Dono
programme.desc: Raja discovers that his face is similar to that of Dr Shekhar, one of the top earning doctors of Bombay. He manages to take his place, but discovers that Dr Shekhar has many problems of his own.

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Curmudgeonly Shekhar (Amitabh Bachchan) is new to the block, and it doesn't take long before the street noise, as well as the children playing nearby, push his tolerance to the limit. To the rescue comes Mili (Suresh Chatwal), who has the exact opposite disposition. While Shekhar may be at a loss over what to do with her at first, he eventually falls in love. Unfortunately, when the time comes to ask for her hand, he finds out Mili has a fatal medical condition and only has a few weeks to live.

programme.title: Apna Bana Lo
programme.desc: A widowed mother loses her child near a well during a journey on foot. Follows her emotional path through grief and acceptance as she navigates life after the devastating loss.

programme.title: Aatish
programme.desc: Baba turns to crime to support his brother, Avinash. However, Baba keeps him distant from the underworld nexus, but problems escalate when Avinash becomes a cop and is assigned to arrest his own brother.

programme.title: Time Story
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: ORU KUPRASIDHA PAYYAN
programme.desc: Ajayan, an introverted young man, feels helpless when he is accused of murdering an old woman until Hannah, a novice yet astute lawyer, comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Haathi Friends forever
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Zila Ghaziabad
programme.desc: A gang war erupts between corrupt chairman Brahampal and gangster Fauji. Betrayal and shifting loyalties escalate the conflict, plunging the village into chaos and violence as personal vendettas drive the characters towards an uncertain future.

programme.title: Zila Ghaziabad
programme.desc: A gang war erupts between corrupt chairman Brahampal and gangster Fauji. Betrayal and shifting loyalties escalate the conflict, plunging the village into chaos and violence as personal vendettas drive the characters towards an uncertain future.

programme.title: Aan: Men At Work
programme.desc: On a mission to make Mumbai crime-free, DCP Hari Om Patnaik and his team fights against some corrupt politicians and their associates. In the process, their faith in law and order is put to test.

programme.title: Shyam Ghanshyam
programme.desc: Sham Gansham (1998) action drama: After their father's murder by a corrupt collector, two brothers seek vengeance years later.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: CBI inspector Shyam Kumar investigates a fake cheque scam, uncovering a web of deceit where no one is who they seem.

programme.title: Holi Aayee Re
programme.desc: In Goa, conman Kishan, dancer Julie, and schemer Sania get entangled with gangsters and cops in a chaotic web of deceit.

programme.title: Black Cobra 3: The Manila Connection
programme.desc: A shipment of American weapons is stolen in the Philippines. An American named Hawkins tries to find the weapons. Hawkins ends up dead. Chicago policeman Bob Malone is called in to... See more »

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: Breakdown Lane
programme.desc: When Kirby's SUV stalls in the desert, she must overcome the elements and the lurking undead to get home. Her only companion is Max, the Emergency Car Service Rep trapped in his office by the zombies.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black & white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyar
programme.desc: Gangotri Pictures Pvt. Ltd's Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyaar is a love story that's set in a village. Seema (Lovely Joshi), who is a daughter of a high caste Pandit Deendayal, falls in love with an educated Dalit boy Nikhil (Uttam Kumar. When Pandit Deendayal doesn't approve of their love, the two lovers elope, only to be chased by Pandit Deendayal's henchmen, whom Nikhil kills one by one. Amidst all this, there is also a parallel story that speaks of an enmity between Pandit Deendayal and Thakur Surendra Singh Rana, whose enmity gets further fanned up by two villagers Abdul and Malkhi.

programme.title: Pahredaar
programme.desc: Raghu meets Malavika in New Zealand. While on a road trip to Christchurch, they get close. Upon arriving they don't reveal their feelings for each other. Will they ever meet again? Will they express their feelings?

programme.title: Freaky Ali
programme.desc: After a chance encounter with a golfer inspires him, Ali, a debt collector working for a gangster, pursues the sport professionally. Soon, he becomes a champion, but he must face a corrupt rival.

programme.title: Mudrank
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Telgi Scam , How it all started & where it is as of today . Who all where involved in it. The film is an actual fictional depiction of all the real characters in reality

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.desc: After a night out in a downtown Denver nightclub, Kenia Monge wanders the streets without a purse or phone her journey leads to encounters with several men --some good, and one who drives a creepy white van.

programme.title: Man With a Van
programme.desc: When Ray and Marie Thornton go out for a drive in the country on Easter Sunday, they are almost chased off the road by a tailgating van and when they see the driver changing license plates and dumping a bloody sheet, they call police.

programme.title: Man With a Van
programme.desc: Meredith Emerson decides to celebrate the new year by hiking on Georgia's Blood Mountain with her dog, Ella, but when Meredith goes missing and Ella is found 60 miles away, an all-out search begins.

programme.title: Man With a Van
programme.desc: Dawnia Dacosta attends nursing school, works the late shift and goes to church for evening services one night she runs out of fuel and walks to the nearest station then a man in a van offers a ride back to her car.

programme.title: Deadly Sins

programme.title: Social List
programme.desc: In this episode of #SocialList, Ashish and Abhilash discuss PM Modi's appeal to not buy gold and the viral fake news about Indira Gandhi's similar appeal in 1967. The Hindu has officially clarified that the old newspaper claim is false.

programme.title: Sehat
programme.desc: In today's Sehat Show, we cover three essential health topics: top supplements for men, PM Modi's advice on reducing oil intake, and how to cook vegetables without oil. Expert doctors and a clinical nutritionist answer all your questions.

programme.title: The Cinema Show
programme.desc: In today's The Cinema Show, we cover the explosive Prabhas vs Vivek Oberoi action sequence in Spirit, Salman Khan's locked look for SVC63, and a fresh update on Drishyam 3 starring Ajay Devgn. Don't miss out on important cinema updates!

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: Will Rahul Gandhi repeat Sonia Gandhi's old Kerala mistake? Congress faces a major dilemma over the next Kerala CM, with KC Venugopal, VD Satheesan, and Ramesh Chennithala all in the race. Watch the full analysis of this internal power struggle.

programme.title: Asaan Bhasa Mein
programme.desc: Aasan Bhasha Mein | in this episode, we explain why film stars in South India are worshipped like gods and how cinema shapes politics. From MGR and Jayalalithaa to Rajinikanth, Pawan Kalyan and Vijay, understand the rise of fan culture and political power.

programme.title: Tarikh
programme.desc: This episode of Tarikh dives into Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee's fight against the idea of a “United Bengal” during India's Partition. Watch how his opposition shaped Bengal's future and led to the birth of the Bharatiya Jana Sangh.

programme.title: Sciencekaari
programme.desc: A Hantavirus outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius is raising COVID-era concerns again. This video breaks down what the virus is, how it attacks the body, and whether it could become the next pandemic.

programme.title: Ground Report
programme.desc: NEET UG 2026 has been cancelled after a 'guess paper' leak, confirmed by the NTA on X. With over 22 lakh students affected, watch this video for all the details on the growing credibility crisis.

programme.title: GITN
programme.desc: In this special Guest In The Newsroom episode, celebrated folk singer Malini Awasthi joins us for a heartfelt conversation on music, culture, politics, and life. From Banaras and Bollywood to ghosts and bureaucracy—don't miss this journey full of wit, wisdom, and wonderful memories.

programme.title: Baithki

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: Rakhwale | in this episode, NSG commando Tushar Joshi recalls the 2002 Akshardham terror attack and the 14-hour Operation Vajra Shakti. A rare, first-hand account of strategy, sacrifice, and saving innocent lives.

programme.title: Tarikh
programme.desc: The Lallantop

programme.title: Sciencekaari
programme.desc: Aasan Bhasha Mein | in this episode, we explain why uranium enrichment is at the center of conflicts involving Iran, the US and Israel. From uranium mining in India to how nuclear bombs work, understand the science in simple language.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: This week on Netanagari, Siddhant Mohan breaks down the NEET paper leak scandal and why Kerala got a new Chief Minister 10 days after results. From NTA's failures to Rahul Gandhi's close aide missing out, watch the full deep dive.

programme.title: Markandeya Puranam by Vaddiparthi Padmakar
programme.desc: Markandeya Puranam, by Vaddiparthi Padmakar, presents the essence of the ancient Markandeya Purana in a simple and engaging manner. Through the story of Sage Markandeya, the work highlights the values of devotion, righteousness, self-discipline, and faith in divine justice. The book emphasizes moral living and spiritual wisdom, making traditional puranic teachings accessible and meaningful to modern readers.

programme.title: Dharma Sandehalu | Kakunuri Suryanarayana
programme.desc: Dharma Sandehalu preaches rational thinking and moral awareness by questioning traditional notions of dharma. Kakunuri Suryanarayana emphasizes that true dharma lies in justice, humanity, and ethical reasoning rather than blind faith or rigid customs. The work urges individuals to think critically, act responsibly, and align moral values with social progress and human welfare.

programme.title: Dharma Sandehalu by TKV Raghavan
programme.desc: Dharma Sandehalu by TKV Raghavan is a thoughtful and insightful show that addresses common doubts and questions related to dharma, life values, and ethical living. Through simple explanations, real-life examples, and spiritual wisdom, the program helps audiences understand how dharma applies to everyday situations. The show aims to guide viewers toward clarity, inner peace, and righteous living in a practical and relatable manner.

programme.title: Alapati Chamakkulu
programme.desc: Alapati Chamakkulu is a fun infotainment show that explores human relationships, lifestyle, and motivational themes. Blending humor with meaningful insights, the show presents relatable stories and real-life experiences that inspire, entertain, and connect with audiences across all age groups.

programme.desc: This is probably the most challenging video we've ever shot. Not because the content was hard to capture or shoot, but because it was impossible for us to whisper for an entire video! Did we give you tingles, or did we ruin ASMR forever?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: We got our chi flowing and opened our third eyes with tiny little needles all over our bodies. Would you try acupuncture?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The boys learn how to throw clay and make a bowl from scratch! Who do you think will make the best one?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: In the first of a series, the Try Guys will walk a mile in old people's proverbial orthopedic shoes to see what it's like to be elderly and learn about the physical changes that await them.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys take a genetic test to find out if they have any mutations in their DNA and visit a general practitioner to discuss the best longevity practices. The second of a special four-part series exploring old age.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The Try Guys strap on ol' AGNES again, the old age body simulator, and attempt to go about their regular activities for an entire day in a world incompatible with and inaccessible to older people. The third of a special four-part series exploring old age.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys get professional makeup to get a taste of what they'll look like when they're 80, and then show their loved ones to gauge their reactions. The final video of a special four-part series exploring old age.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys are rolling with the homies as they learn how to make professional sushi rolls and compete in a culinary maki battle. Who will win and be crowned Mr. Rice Guy?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: Introducing...The Travel Guys! The guys explore Austin, Texas to discover all the weird, fun, and surprising activities the city has to offer. What city should they travel to next?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys and special guest Jack Douglass get their earwax removed - ew!! Who will be the waxiest boy?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: We tried to paint our staff like french girls and WOW was this a ride! 👨‍🎨🎨 How do you think our art turned out?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: We tried to become mixology masters in this crazy cocktail competition mix-off! Who do you think did it best? Shake it baby!

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: This may be our most emotional video yet! Take a look at all the beautiful creatures we met on our journey in Australia and watch us try out life as a Zookeeper for the day! More videos exploring life down under are on the way! 🐨🦘🐍

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: Some of the most beautiful latte art you'll ever see, enjoy our caffeine craziness! ☕

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: Watch us shuck a ton of oysters and taste some of the finest seafood delicacies Australia has to offer in our journey down under the SEA!

To make t_hings even more interesting, Von Bolt accidentally discovers that Bob is actually - Santa Claus! / And To All a Good Flight: Marooned on the moon on December 24th by Rupert and the elves, the Secret Lab Kids have only a few hours left to get back to Earth, restore Santa Claus to his sleigh and save Christmas.

programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.desc: is an imaginative adventure where the duo shrinks during a thunderstorm, explores a giant toy-filled room, and uses their wit to overcome chall_hines. With the help of a toy plane and a laser gun, they return to their normal size, celebrating their triumph with joy and laughter.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wildadventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that drawsvisitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu-Spring Into Action
programme.desc: The forest animals love trees, flowers and spring. So it's up to the bear brothers to stop Logger Vick from chopping down every tree.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wildadventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that drawsvisitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife.

programme.title: Fury Spinner
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu-Spring Into Action
programme.desc: The forest animals love trees, flowers and spring. So it's up to the bear brothers to stop Logger Vick from chopping down every tree.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Gogobus
programme.desc: This series is about the adventures of the children, in a beautiful coastal town, who are learning and playing in Sunshine Forest Kindergarten. To keep the children safe, the kindergarten owner builds the world's first artificial intelligence school bus.

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! Come journey with us to a charming little town called Fortune Valley, where the twelve animal-totems now associated with the Chinese lunar calendar spend their days frolicking merrily, often joining together to pursue a host of colorful projects and plans.

programme.title: Gogobus
programme.desc: This series is about the adventures of the children, in a beautiful coastal town, who are learning and playing in Sunshine Forest Kindergarten. To keep the children safe, the kindergarten owner builds the world's first artificial intelligence school bus.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King Ep 08
programme.desc: The Lion King is shot by poachers, as part of Shere Khan the Bengal tiger's plot to overthrow the king from his throne. Young Simba, son of the Lion King, suspects something strange and subconsciously senses that the Tiger will one day be his greatest enemy. Simba and his two sisters are adopted into a wolf pack.

programme.title: Robinhood
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Crazy Candies
programme.desc: Dream is the source of Power.It inspires people with their vision of a beautiful and bright future.In the midst of ordinary life in Magic Dream Jar,the extraordinary happens because of Marshyo and his best friend Jacky.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt
programme.desc: What starts as a business trip to Innsbruck for Georgie and Bienve, turns into a reunion with MTB icon - Fabio Wibmer. Discover how the YouTube superstar lives, how Georgie overcomes his fears, and witness some of the most epic riding of the season.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt
programme.desc: On the way to their live show in Chile, the crew's entire plan falls apart while Georgie and some of the team are stranded in the Middle East. But in true M.O.D style, the guys maintain a positive attitude that leads to an insane trip.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider
programme.desc: In an Ultimate Rider first, the rookies will race side by side against each other in pairs. The pressure is huge as the judges decide there will be a surprise elimination and the rookies wont know until the points are revealed later in the day.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider
programme.desc: Honda Motocross rider, Ryan Mitchell, joins the rookies to give them a masterclass. Who will shine on the track this week to avoid elimination?

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider
programme.desc: The rookies face their most difficult challenge yet, making it as much of a mental battle, as it is physical. They then need to muster whatever they have left in the tank to complete a timed endurance circuit.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown
programme.desc: It's week four and the contestants are preparing for a new round of challenges...and for our eight remaining rookies the elimination room looms.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown
programme.desc: In a surprise twist, a special guest judge will deal out some honest truths to the remaining rookies. Who will be sent home tonight?

programme.title: Supercar Showdown
programme.desc: Being a successful V8 Supercar driver means more than just driving, you need to be the whole package...This week the contestants will learn why communication is an important skill to master.

programme.title: Endurance
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours at Spa S3 - "Through the Night
programme.desc: The 24 Hours of Spa is a notoriously difficult race. For Andy Soucek, Albert Costa and Lewis Williamson, making it through night presents a tough challenge.

programme.title: Find Me A Classic
programme.desc: Mat's demanding client Gordon is in search of a Morgan, but will he be able to find the ideal car for the right price?

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: Compact SUVs from the Far East
programme.desc: With its extravagant design the Lexus NX200t definitely stands out. Infiniti, Nissan's luxury division, is more conservative in that regard. The QX30 features a classic Infiniti design with a curved bonnet. Also: the city SUV Mazda CX-3.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Three brothers from the same Volkswagen production platform: the Skoda Kodiaq provides room for seven people, the Volkswagen Tiguan is a bit more expensive but offers a broader range of engines, and Seat infuse the SUV segment with Spanish passion.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Jaguar XF-S is supposed to put pressure on BMW, Audi and the other competitors in the business class segment. Volvo take a different approach. Their S90 is captivating due to its Scandinavian design and economical four-cylinder engines.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: ORZ Vehicles, a German company specializing in the production, sale and installation of Jeep parts and accessories, makes the American off-road dream come true. A good example for this approach is the Brute, a pickup version of the Wrangler.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Seat Arona is a typical compact or mini SUV. Another pseudo off-roader is the Volkswagen T-Roc. Can the smallest Volkswagen SUV repeat the success of the best-selling Tiguan? Also: the Asian competitors Hyundai Kona, KIA Stonic and Toyota C-HR.

programme.title: BMW F 800 R
programme.desc: The agile and robust roadster BMW F 800 R.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Epic Ke Dus
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. This panel is seen on the episodes giving their views on the events, the significance of the event and describing the mood of the era, publics reaction to these events and how it contributed to change the course of Indian history.

programme.title: Bharat Ratna The Jewels Of India
programme.desc: Bharat Ratna The Jewels of India is a show that celebrates the recipients of India's highest civilian honour. Through the medium of graphics and information, the show, intends to exhibit hidden unknown and loved stories from lives of these legendary characters.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: Blue World investigates a huge grouper that's making a comeback in Florida, visits Australia's Great Barrier Reef, and studies camouflage in sea creatures.

programme.sub-title: Sully the Pilot Whale and Cleaning Stations

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Who reigns supreme in the wild? Discover the untold stories of nature's fiercest competitors and most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Dog Dudes: Pack Power

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Bloodworm!
programme.desc: A second sighting of the rare blue frog leaves Coyote stunned. The frog's vibrant coloration is even more incredible up close.Giant bloodworms have jaws and venom, and they're not shy about using either. Mark finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Stung by 200 Angry Yellowjackets!
programme.desc: 200 angry yellowjackets swarm Coyote during this painful sting challenge. He analyzes the results while barely keeping his cool.A filming prank turns into a police encounter! Coyote gets arrested while making a video—proof that wild adventures sometimes cross the line.

programme.title: Bitten by Giant Soldier Ants!
programme.desc: Ants that don't just bite—they coordinate! Coyote is bitten by giant soldier ants to demonstrate their incredible defense strategy.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Toxic Worms! (Which Is Worst?)
programme.desc: Three worms, three different toxins. Coyote compares the effects of each to determine which toxic worm inflicts the worst bite of all.Cold-stunned sea turtles wash ashore, helpless. Mark joins a rescue effort to revive and release these beautiful reptiles back to the ocean.

programme.title: Venomous Sewer Snake Found in Bangkok!
programme.desc: Urban exploration gets wild when Mark finds a rare venomous snake deep in the sewer systems of Bangkok.This insect doesn't bite—it sprays acid! Mark discovers a rare bug with an unbelievable defense mechanism aimed right at the eyes.

programme.title: Stung by an Electric Caterpillar!
programme.desc: This episode features a painful sting from the electric caterpillar, a bizarre jungle dweller with venomous barbs. It's shocking—literally.A sting from Japan's meanest wasp! This aggressive insect doesn't hold back. Mark's reaction is both painful and fascinating.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)

programme.title: Did I Find a Murder Hornet in the USA?!

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.desc: On the Dine Your Sign Spring Special, Chef Siobhan Detkavich is cooking for Aries, Taurus, and Gemini! First, quiche with the season's most delicious gifts – tender asparagus and earthy morels – suspended in silky custard and smothered in creamy fontina cheese! Next, spring lamb is stuffed with a sprightly pesto of mint and dandelion greens and roasted with shallots and new potatoes. Then, it's an easy, healthy halibut dish with ramps (aka ‘wild garlic') and grassy fiddleheads – the fish is steamed and finished with a sizzling pour over oil treatment that leaves the kitchen smelling like heaven! Finally, dessert a spring sign is sure to love: buttery, flaky croissant, stuffed with rich mascarpone cheese and tangy, sweet, balsamic-marinated strawberries! Hooray Spring!

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S-Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI Challenge 2022
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.desc: Automotions

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Beth is a busy, successful, single executive whose life consists of five-star hotels, gourmet restaurants and VIP airport lounges. But her own house, a midtown Toronto duplex, doesn't measure up. As a result, she feels more at home on the road than in her own house. Designer Samantha Pynn uses silks, metallic wallpaper, glass tabletops and mirrored doors to transform Beth's dowdy living quarters into a glamorous and luxurious space.
